---
title: "redactor.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/redactor.py"
loc: 36
complexity: 6
logic_score: 7.27
style_score: 3.72
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.91
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating Redactor, __new__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import Redactor and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [re](file://re)
- [src.tools.vault](file://src.tools.vault)

### Exports
- `Redactor`
- `__new__`
- `_initialize`
- `redact`
- `redact_shorthand`
